title: F4-
description: F4 is an MCTiers-approved alternative to traditional freelook mods used in clients such as Feather and Lunar, designed to comply with camera movement rules.
body:
This project is an MCTiers-friendly alternative to the freelook mods or widgets found in clients such as Feather Client, Lunar Client, and others.

Freelook is banned on MCTiers because it modifies how the camera behaves. This mod complies with their mod policy by using Minecraft’s default F5 perspective while holding F4, simply switching the camera to third person without altering any camera mechanics.

You can change the F4 keybind to any key you prefer by opening the Controls menu, navigating to the F4 Keybind category, and assigning it to your desired key.
